title: TrustBench Task
description: Schema for a TrustBench SOC 2 compliance evaluation task

control_description.description: Full text of the control requirement

difficulty.description: 1=trivial single-doc gap, 2=single-doc subtle gap, 3=multi-doc cross-reference, 4=multi-doc with noise/red herrings, 5=ambiguous judgment call requiring materiality assessment

noise_files.description: Evidence files included that contain no relevant findings. Tests whether the model avoids false positives from irrelevant documents.

prompt.description: The audit instruction given to the model

findings.description: Ground-truth findings the model should identify

type.description: gap = real finding that should be reported. red_herring = looks like a gap but has a valid explanation in another document — model should NOT flag this.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the finding and why it matters

evidence_sources.description: Which evidence files must be referenced to identify this finding

expected_reasoning.description: The reasoning chain a competent auditor would follow

minimum_keyword_matches.description: How many keywords must match for the finding to count as detected

exclusion_keywords.description: Keywords that indicate a false positive (for red_herring type: if model uses these, it correctly dismissed the red herring)

scoring.description: How to compute the final score for this task

method.description: detection_only = recall only. detection_and_precision = penalizes over-reporting. f1 = harmonic mean of precision and recall.

max_expected_findings.description: Upper bound on reasonable number of findings. Models reporting more than this are penalized for over-reporting.

estimated_human_time.description: How long this would take a competent auditor

documents_count.description: Total number of evidence documents provided (including noise)

relevant_documents_count.description: Number of documents that actually contain or relate to findings
